text: إِنَّهُ‌ کَانَ‌ لاَ يُؤْمِنُ‌ بِاللَّهِ‌ الْعَظِيمِ‌

en.ahmedali: He did not believe in God the supreme,
en.ahmedraza: “Indeed he refused to accept faith in Allah, the Greatest.”
en.arberry: Behold, he never believed in God the All-mighty,
en.daryabadi: Verily he was wont not to believe in Allah, the Mighty.
en.hilali: Verily, He used not to believe in Allah, the Most Great,
en.itani: For he would not believe in God the Great.
en.maududi: He would not believe in Allah, the Most Great;
en.mubarakpuri: Verily, he used not to believe in Allah, the Most Great,
en.pickthall: Lo! He used not to believe in Allah the Tremendous,
en.qarai: Indeed he had no faith in Allah, the All-supreme,
en.qaribullah: He did not believe in Allah, the Great,
en.sahih: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,
en.sarwar: they did not believe in the great God,
en.shakir: Surely he did not believe in Allah, the Great,
en.transliteration: Innahu kana la yuminu biAllahi alAAatheemi
en.wahiduddin: for he did not believe in Almighty God,
en.yusufali: "This was he that would not believe in Allah Most High.
fa.ansarian: زیرا او به خدای بزرگ ایمان نمی آورده
fa.ayati: زيرا به خداى بزرگ ايمان نداشت.
fa.bahrampour: چرا كه او به خداى بزرگ ايمان نمى‌آورد
fa.fooladvand: چرا كه او به خداى بزرگ نمى‌گرويد.
fa.ghomshei: که او به خدای بزرگ ایمان نیاورده.
fa.khorramdel: چرا که او به خداوند بزرگ ایمان نمی‌آورد. [[«کَانَ لا یُؤْمِنُ»: در سراسر زندگی دنیویش، ایمان و باور نداشت.]]
fa.khorramshahi: که او به خداوند بزرگ ایمانی نداشت‌
fa.makarem: چرا که او هرگز به خداوند بزرگ ایمان نمی‌آورد،
fa.moezzi: که بود او ایمان نمی‌آورد به خدای بزرگ‌
fa.mojtabavi: زيرا كه او به خداى بزرگ ايمان نمى‌داشت،
fa.sadeqi: «او به‌راستی به خدای بزرگ ایمان نمی‌آورده.
